[[File:Vesta's longsword (Last Man Standing) detail.png|150px|left]]
'''Vesta's longsword''' from [[Last Man Standing]] is a minigame-exclusive variant of the normal [[Vesta's longsword]]. It can be obtained from opening the [[Chest (Last Man Standing)|chests]] with a [[bloodier key]], or looting the [[Crate (Last Man Standing)|crates]] that spawn at random locations on the map. It is dropped on death to whoever killed you.

==Special attack==
[[File:Feint.gif|thumb|260px|A player performing Vesta's longsword's special attack.]]
Vesta's longsword has a [[special attack]], ''Feint'', that consumes 25% of the player's [[special attack energy]] and deals between 20% and 120% of the user's max hit, with the accuracy of this attack rolled against 25% of the opponent's [[defence]].
